description: AT&T FinOps AI Governance Demo Manifest — source of truth for PDF generation and bronze table data. All 15 AI vendor contracts are defined here. Both the PDF generator and the bronze CSV loader derive from this file.
demo_date_context: Demo assumes 'today' is approximately April 2026. Adjust contract_end dates if demoing significantly later.

ai_services.service_name: Scale AI Generative AI Data Engine

contracts.advance_payment: $2,000,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: This Agreement shall automatically renew for successive one (1) year terms unless either party provides ninety (90) days written notice of non-renewal prior to the then-current expiration date
contracts.data_residency_terms: All inference traffic and customer data shall be processed and stored exclusively within AWS US-East (Virginia) or US-West (Oregon) regions. No data shall transit outside the United States at any time during the Term.
contracts.training_data_terms: Customer inputs and outputs may be retained by Vendor for up to thirty (30) days for abuse monitoring and service improvement purposes. Vendor shall not use Customer content for training of foundation models absent Customer's explicit written opt-in. Aggregated, anonymized usage metadata may be used by Vendor for service enhancement.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer retains all right, title, and interest in and to all Outputs generated from Customer Inputs, subject to Vendor's underlying model IP.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Customer shall not use Outputs to develop, train, or fine-tune any model that competes with Vendor's foundation models.
special_clauses: Quarterly usage and spend review required
True-up clause at end of Term — Customer pays overage at 15% premium on committed token rate
contracts.demo_notes: PRIMARY ANCHOR. Expiring Jun 2026 (within 90 days), trending $1.5M OVER committed spend, AI governance addendum MISSING, ambiguous training-data language ('may be retained for 30 days'). Drives the whole Genie→KA→MCP demo story.

contracts.advance_payment: $1,250,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.data_residency_terms: Customer may elect US or EU data residency. All inference and logging remain in the elected region. Default region: US.
contracts.training_data_terms: Vendor will NOT use Customer Inputs, Outputs, or any derived data to train, fine-tune, or evaluate any foundation model under any circumstance. All prompts and completions are deleted within thirty (30) days of processing unless retained by Customer for audit purposes.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: Vendor's Acceptable Use Policy and Responsible Scaling Policy are incorporated by reference. Customer agrees to Vendor's Usage Policies including prohibitions on election-related content generation, CSAM, and weapons-related queries. Vendor maintains Constitutional AI safety measures on all model outputs.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer owns all Outputs. Vendor disclaims any license back to Outputs.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Customer may not resell API access or use Outputs to train competing AI models.
special_clauses: Zero data retention option available at no additional cost
Monthly model card and safety report delivery
contracts.demo_notes: CONTRAST ANCHOR. Explicit no-training clause, governance addendum PRESENT, healthy utilization. Used for KA compare-and-contrast with OpenAI.

contracts.advance_payment: $3,000,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Two (2) successive one-year renewals unless Customer provides 180 days written notice
contracts.data_residency_terms: All Vertex AI inference remains in elected US regions. Cross-region replication disabled by default.
contracts.training_data_terms: Google shall not use Customer Data to train foundation models. Customer Data includes prompts, completions, embeddings, and fine-tuning datasets. Log retention capped at 24 hours for abuse monitoring only.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: Google's Responsible AI Principles apply. Customer receives access to Vertex AI Safety Filters (harassment, hate speech, sexually explicit, dangerous content) configurable at inference time. SynthID watermarking available for generated images.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer retains ownership of Outputs generated from Customer Inputs.
special_clauses: Committed Use Discount of 25% applied at $10M annual threshold
Indemnification for foundation-model-generated IP infringement up to $5M
contracts.demo_notes: Largest AI commitment by value. Long-term, healthy, strong governance — model contract. Shows Mobility BU AI footprint.

contracts.advance_payment: $700,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.data_residency_terms: Customer elects AWS regions on a per-invocation basis. Bedrock does not persist Customer prompts or completions.
contracts.training_data_terms: AWS and third-party model providers accessed through Bedrock shall not use Customer inputs to train their models. This applies to Anthropic, Meta, Mistral, Cohere, AI21, Stability, and Amazon Titan models available via the service.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Model-specific sublicensing restrictions apply per third-party model provider (see Schedule B).
special_clauses: Multi-region failover permitted
Bedrock Guardrails included at no additional cost
contracts.demo_notes: Expiring soon (Jun 2026), no auto-renewal — creates renewal decision point. Governance addendum missing but vendor strong on training-data restriction. Network Ops BU.

contracts.advance_payment: $2,375,000 USD due within 60 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for one (1) additional year unless either party provides ninety (90) days written notice
contracts.mfn_terms: If Vendor offers H100 reserved capacity at a lower per-GPU-hour rate to any comparable hyperscaler customer during the Term, Customer shall receive equivalent pricing retroactive to the start of that benchmark period.
contracts.training_data_terms: Customer workloads run on dedicated infrastructure; Vendor has no access to Customer data.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer owns all models trained on reserved GPU capacity.
special_clauses: Reserved capacity of 256 H100 GPUs for 3 years
Burst-to-shared-pool available at 1.5x on-demand rate
contracts.demo_notes: Large R&D GPU commitment. MFN clause for price protection. Long-term. Shows infrastructure spend vs services spend.

contracts.advance_payment: $1,800,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for two (2) successive one-year periods unless either party provides 180 days written notice
contracts.data_residency_terms: Customer's Unity Catalog storage remains in Customer-owned AWS account; Databricks control plane operates in US-East.
contracts.training_data_terms: Vendor shall not access Customer data in Customer's Unity Catalog. Model Serving logs may be retained for 7 days for operational telemetry only; never used for foundation model training.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: Agent Evaluation, MLflow tracking, and Unity Catalog governance are included. Lakehouse AI Gateway enforces prompt filtering and PII redaction at the platform level.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer owns all models and Outputs produced on the platform.
special_clauses: Committed DBU discount of 30%
Free Genie access for all Customer Unity Catalog users
contracts.demo_notes: Long-term ML platform for CX. Exemplary governance. Shows ML platform spend category.

contracts.advance_payment: $700,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for one (1) year unless Customer provides ninety (90) days written notice
contracts.data_residency_terms: Cortex functions run in Customer's elected Snowflake deployment region. No cross-region data movement.
contracts.training_data_terms: Snowflake and its model providers (Mistral, Meta, Reka) shall not use Customer data for model training. Cortex inference is stateless with no prompt retention.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer retains ownership of all Cortex Outputs.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Cortex-generated Outputs may not be used to train competing LLMs.
special_clauses: Credit-based consumption — 100M credits per year included
Ask AI and Document AI features enabled
contracts.demo_notes: Expiring Jul 2026 (within 90 days window), governance addendum MISSING. Finance BU.

contracts.service_name: Scale AI Generative AI Data Engine
contracts.advance_payment: $1,050,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.data_residency_terms: All labeling work performed by US-based taskers. Customer data never leaves US AWS regions.
contracts.training_data_terms: Scale AI will not retain, reuse, or sell any Customer data provided for labeling. All data purged within 30 days of project completion.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: Scale SEAL evaluation framework applied to all delivered datasets. Bias and representation audits included quarterly.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: All labeled datasets are Customer property upon delivery.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Labelers are under strict NDA; no redistribution of Customer source material permitted.
special_clauses: US-based tasker requirement (security-cleared pool)
RLHF and red-team evaluation packages included
contracts.demo_notes: R&D data labeling for internal LLM fine-tuning. Shows data labeling category. Strong governance.

contracts.advance_payment: $480,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.training_data_terms: Standard OpenAI Usage Policies apply. 30-day retention for abuse monitoring.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer retains ownership of Outputs subject to Vendor Usage Policies.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Standard OpenAI restrictions on competing-model training.
special_clauses: Expired and consolidated into AI-0001 enterprise agreement
Data retention record-of-destruction required within 30 days
contracts.demo_notes: Recently expired Consumer Wireless OpenAI contract. Shows the BU had a standalone deal before consolidating under enterprise agreement AI-0001. Drives a 'we already have OpenAI elsewhere' insight.

contracts.advance_payment: $130,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for one (1) year unless Customer provides sixty (60) days written notice
contracts.data_residency_terms: Customer elects deployment region. No cross-region data movement.
contracts.training_data_terms: Cohere will not use Customer data for training. Zero retention option available.
special_clauses: Primarily used for internal HR document retrieval
Embed v3 included at no additional cost
contracts.demo_notes: Small BU-level deal (HR). Expiring within 90 days. Governance addendum missing. Shows long-tail AI vendor sprawl.

contracts.advance_payment: $220,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.data_residency_terms: Labeled assets stored in Labelbox US-East region.
contracts.training_data_terms: Labelbox shall not use Customer data for its own foundation model training.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer owns labeled datasets and any foundation models derived therein.
special_clauses: Used primarily for network topology image labeling
Model-assisted labeling included
contracts.demo_notes: Second data labeling deal — Network Ops. Long-term. Missing governance addendum — flag.

contracts.advance_payment: $950,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.mfn_terms: If Vendor licenses its AutoML platform to a comparable telecommunications customer at a lower per-seat or per-workflow rate during the Term, Customer shall receive a retroactive rate adjustment equivalent to the most favorable terms offered.
contracts.data_residency_terms: All model training and inference occurs within Customer-elected US regions.
contracts.training_data_terms: DataRobot does not use Customer training data for its own product development.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: MLOps bias and drift monitoring included. Humble AI framework applied to all production models.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: No redistribution of trained models to third parties without DataRobot's written consent.
special_clauses: Legacy credit risk and fraud detection models
Content removal within 14 days of Term expiration
contracts.demo_notes: Recently expired Finance AutoML contract. Has MFN. Shows expired-deal patterns and strict governance.

contracts.advance_payment: $1,700,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for two (2) successive one-year periods unless either party provides 180 days written notice
contracts.data_residency_terms: FedRAMP-compliant US-only deployment with CJIS-ready enclaves.
contracts.training_data_terms: Palantir shall not use Customer data for any model training. Ontology and AIP components operate within Customer boundary.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: AI Ethics Council review required for all production agent deployments. Red-team testing and kill-switch controls mandatory per AIP deployment.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer owns all ontologies, workflows, and model Outputs.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: AIP components may not be repackaged or resold.
special_clauses: Deployed in SOC for insider-threat detection and network intrusion
24x7 named Palantir FDE support
contracts.demo_notes: Cybersecurity BU AI platform. Long-term, strong governance (FedRAMP High). Model governance contract.

contracts.advance_payment: $800,000 USD due within 30 days of execution
contracts.mfn_terms: If Vendor offers more favorable committed-token rates to any comparable enterprise customer during the Term, Customer shall receive equivalent pricing.
contracts.data_residency_terms: US-only deployment. Zero data retention enabled by default for this Customer.
contracts.training_data_terms: Vendor will not use Customer Inputs or Outputs for any training or evaluation purpose.
contracts.ai_governance_terms: Vendor's Acceptable Use Policy and Responsible Scaling Policy apply. Constitutional AI safety features enabled.
contracts.sublicensing_terms: Outputs may not be used to train competing AI models.
special_clauses: Used by Mobility for customer-facing virtual agent (5G Plus support)
Volume discount at $3M threshold
contracts.demo_notes: Second Anthropic deal — different BU (Mobility). Shows multi-BU vendor relationships.

contracts.advance_payment: $120,000 USD due within 45 days of execution
contracts.auto_renewal_terms: Automatic renewal for one (1) year unless Customer provides sixty (60) days written notice
contracts.training_data_terms: Hugging Face shall not use private model weights or inference traffic for platform model training.
contracts.output_ownership_terms: Customer owns all privately hosted model weights and Outputs.
special_clauses: Private model hub with 50 named seats
Inference Endpoints credit pool included
contracts.demo_notes: Small R&D model hosting. No data residency clause (EU region permitted!) — compliance concern. Shows shadow-IT style small vendor contracts.

demo_story.description: Scripted question flow for live demos. Each question routes to a specific agent surface.

questions.question: Which AI vendor contracts are trending over committed spend this quarter, and by how much?
questions.expected_results: AI-0001 OpenAI trending ~$1.5M over $8M committed (AT&T Business BU). Possibly AI-0005 NVIDIA depending on burst usage.
questions.narrative: Find the problem — surface FinOps risk

questions.question: What is our total AI vendor spend by service category and business unit, ranked by committed value?
questions.expected_results: LLM API dominant (~$31M across OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, AWS, Cohere). GPU Compute (~$9.5M NVIDIA). ML Platform (~$13.8M Databricks+Snowflake+DataRobot). By BU: Mobility leads, then Business, then CX.
questions.narrative: Portfolio view — where is AI spend concentrated?

questions.question: Which AI contracts expire in the next 90 days or are missing an AI governance addendum?
questions.expected_results: Expiring: AI-0001 OpenAI (Jun 2026), AI-0004 AWS Bedrock (Jun 2026), AI-0007 Snowflake (Jul 2026), AI-0010 Cohere (Jul 2026), AI-0015 HuggingFace (Aug 2026). Missing governance addendum: AI-0001, AI-0004, AI-0007, AI-0010, AI-0011, AI-0015.
questions.narrative: Risk view — what needs attention before it becomes a problem?

questions.question: What are the data-residency and training-data-usage clauses in the AT&T–OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo Enterprise agreement?
questions.expected_results: Contract AI-0001 — data residency US-East/US-West only, training data language is ambiguous: 'may be retained for up to 30 days for abuse monitoring and service improvement.' No explicit prohibition on model training beyond 'without explicit opt-in.'
questions.narrative: Understand the contract language — what is the actual governance risk?

questions.question: Does the AT&T–Anthropic Claude 3 Opus agreement permit AT&T customer data to be used for model training?
questions.expected_results: Contract AI-0002 — NO. Explicit language: 'Vendor will NOT use Customer Inputs, Outputs, or any derived data to train, fine-tune, or evaluate any foundation model under any circumstance.' 30-day auto-delete on prompts/completions.
questions.narrative: Contrast — what governance looks like when done right

questions.question: Flag the OpenAI GPT-4 Turbo Enterprise contract for governance review — missing AI governance addendum, ambiguous training-data language, expiring in Jun 2026, trending over committed spend. Assign to the AT&T AI Council.
questions.expected_results: Opportunity/Task created in Salesforce, assigned to AI Council queue
questions.narrative: Take action — governance issue routed to the right team

data_quality_issues.description: Intentional issues injected into bronze CSVs to make the silver layer meaningful. These are deterministic — every SA gets the same issues.

null_fields.AI-0011: committed_spend_usd has an intentional null in one duplicate row

data_quality_issues.date_anomaly: One duplicate of AI-0003 has contract_end before contract_start
